Explore the T3 Code repository structure. I need to understand:
1. The overall monorepo layout (packages, apps)
2. The contents of packages/contracts and packages/shared (existing types, exports)
3. The web app structure (apps/web/src) - components, hooks, providers, CSS files
4. The server app structure (apps/server/src)
5. Any existing theme-related code
6. The package.json files for each package to understand imports/exports
7. Any existing CSS custom properties or design tokens
8. The main entry points (main.tsx, App.tsx, index.css or similar)

Be thorough - look at file contents for key files like package.json files, tsconfig files, index.css, App.tsx, main.tsx, and any existing providers or hooks.

``` **Font:** DM Sans (variable, 300-800 weight, italic variants) --- ### 10. SERVER APP STRUCTURE (apps/server/src) **Key Components:** - `index.ts` - Main entry point with Effect-TS layers - `main.ts` - CLI commands - `wsServer.ts` - WebSocket server (main communication channel with web app) - `codexAppServerManager.ts` - Orchestration manager - `keybindings.ts` - Keybinding definitions and handling - `config.ts` - Configuration management - Directories: - `checkpointing/` - Session checkpointing - `persistence/` - Database layer - `git/` - Git operations - `orchestration/` - Provider orchestration - `terminal/` - Terminal emulation - `provider/` - Provider management - `telemetry/` - Analytics **Architecture:** Effect-TS based with layer composition --- ### 11. DESIGN TOKENS & CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES **Color Palette:** - **Primary:** oklch(0.488 0.217 264) light, oklch(0.588 0.217 264) dark [Purple] - **Success:** emerald-500/700 (light/dark) - **Warning:** amber-500/700 (light/dark) - **Destructive:** red-500/700 (light/dark) - **Info:** blue-500/700 (light/dark) - **Neutral:** Grayscale with neutral-50 through neutral-950 **Spacing & Border Radius:** - Base radius: 0.625rem (10px) - Radius variants: -sm, -md (default), -lg, -xl, -2xl, -3xl, -4xl **Typography:** - Primary font: DM Sans (variable) - Monospace: SF Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo --- This comprehensive structure establishes a modern, type-safe monorepo with a sophisticated theme system based on CSS custom properties, localStorage persistence, and system preference detection. KEY CSS FEATURES #### **Theme Transition Suppression (index.css lines 55-62):** ```css .no-transitions, .no-transitions * { transition-duration: 0s !important animation-duration: 0s !important } ``` Prevents flash when switching themes #### **Chat Markdown Styling (index.css lines 242-395):** - Custom styles for markdown rendered content - Link styling, code blocks, blockquotes, tables - Diff panel styling integration #### **Frictionless Window Dragging (index.css lines 166-177):** ```css .drag-region { -webkit-app-region: drag } .drag-region button, .drag-region input, etc. { -webkit-app-region: no-drag } ``` For Electron frameless window support #### **Background Noise Pattern (index.css lines 148-157):** - SVG-based fractal noise background overlay - Applied to `body::after` - 3.5% opacity for subtle texture --- ### 7. PACKAGE.JSON FILES #### **Root (package.json):** - Type: "module" (ES modules) - Workspaces: apps/*, packages/*, scripts - Package manager: bun@1.3.9 - Key dev tools: oxlint, oxfmt, turbo, vitest - Scripts: dev, build, typecheck, test, format, clean #### **@t3tools/web (apps/web/package.json):** - **Key Dependencies:** - React 19.0.0, React-DOM 19.0.0 - TanStack Router 1.160.2, React Query 5.90.0 - TailwindCSS 4.0.0 - Lexical 0.41.0 (text editor) - XTerm 6.0.0 (terminal emulator) - Zustand 5.0.11 (state management) - Base-UI React 1.2.0 - Class Variance Authority 0.7.1 - Tailwind Merge 3.4.0 - **Dev Dependencies:** - Vite 8.0.0-beta.12 - TypeScript 5.7.3 - Babel React Compiler - Vitest with browser testing support - Playwright for E2E testing #### **t3 (apps/server/package.json):** - CLI binary: `./dist/index.mjs` - Key Dependencies: - Effect-TS ecosystem - node-pty 1.1.0 - ws (WebSocket) 8.18.0 - open 10.1.0 (open URLs/files) - Node version: ^22.13 || ^23.4 || >=24.10 #### **@t3tools/contracts (packages/contracts/package.json):** - Build: tsdown (produces ESM + CJS + DTS) - Types: `./src/index.ts` - Dependency: effect (catalog version) #### **@t3tools/shared (packages/shared/package.json):** - Exports: `./model`, `./git`, `./logging`, `./shell`, `./Net` - Dependencies: effect, @t3tools/contracts --- ### 8. CONFIGURATION FILES #### **TypeScript (tsconfig.base.json):** - Target: ES2023 - Module: ESNext - Module Resolution: Bundler - Strict mode: true - Extra strict options: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes - Skip lib check: true #### **Web App TypeScript (apps/web/tsconfig.json):** - Extends: ../../tsconfig.base.json - JSX: react-jsx - Lib: ES2023, DOM, DOM.Iterable - Path alias: `~/*` → `./src/*` - Effect language service plugin for diagnostics #### **Vite Config (apps/web/vite.config.ts):** - Plugins: tanstackRouter, react (with babel compiler), tailwindcss - Port: 5733 (or from PORT env var) - Optimize deps: @pierre/diffs, @pierre/diffs/react - HMR config for Electron compatibility - Source map: controlled via T3CODE_WEB_SOURCEMAP env var #### **Components JSON (components.json):** - Style: base-mira (shadcn/ui style) - Tailwind CSS variables: enabled - Icon library: lucide - Aliases configured for clean imports --- ### 9. HTML ENTRY POINT (index.html) ```html T3 Code (Alpha)
``` **Font:** DM Sans (variable, 300-800 weight, italic variants) --- ### 10. SERVER APP STRUCTURE (apps/server/src) **Key Components:** - `index.ts` - Main entry point with Effect-TS layers - `main.ts` - CLI commands - `wsServer.ts` - WebSocket server (main communication channel with web app) - `codexAppServerManager.ts` - Orchestration manager - `keybindings.ts` - Keybinding definitions and handling - `config.ts` - Configuration management - Directories: - `checkpointing/` - Session checkpointing - `persistence/` - Database layer - `git/` - Git operations - `orchestration/` - Provider orchestration - `terminal/` - Terminal emulation - `provider/` - Provider management - `telemetry/` - Analytics **Architecture:** Effect-TS based with layer composition --- ### 11. EXISTING PROVIDERS/CONTEXTS **Current Providers in Router:** 1. **QueryClientProvider** - TanStack React Query 2. **StoreProvider** - Zustand store initialization (no actual Context) **Other Providers in App:** - **ToastProvider** - Custom toast notifications (root route) - **AnchoredToastProvider** - Anchored toast notifications - **SidebarProvider** - Sidebar state management - **DiffWorkerPoolProvider** - Diff rendering with worker pool - **WorkerPoolContextProvider** - From @pierre/diffs **No Existing Theme Context:** - Theme is managed externally (localStorage + class manipulation on documentElement) - No React Context API for theme - Hook-based approach via `useSyncExternalStore` --- ### 12. IMPORT/EXPORT PATTERNS **Package Imports:** - `@t3tools/contracts` - Type definitions and schemas - `@t3tools/shared/model` - Model utilities - `@t3tools/shared/*` - Other shared utilities - `@t3tools/web` - Web package exports (in dev references to workspace:*) **Path Aliases:** - `~/` or `~/*` - Points to `apps/web/src/` **UI Component Imports:** ```typescript import { Button } from "~/components/ui/button" import { Card } from "~/components/ui/card" // etc. ``` --- ### 13. APPLICATION DATA FLOW 1. **Main Entry** → `main.tsx` → Create root element mount 2. **Router Setup** → `router.ts` → Create TanStack Router with context 3. **Providers** → Wrap with QueryClientProvider → StoreProvider 4. **Routes** → File-based from `routes/__root.tsx` 5. **Root Component** → RootRouteView (checks nativeApi) → ToastProvider wrapper 6. **Store** → Zustand store with localStorage persistence 7. **Theme** → useSyncExternalStore hook reading from localStorage, applying classes --- ### 14. KEY FILE PATHS FOR REFERENCE **Contracts & Shared:** - `/packages/contracts/src/index.ts` - Main exports - `/packages/contracts/src/orchestration.ts` - Provider orchestration types - `/packages/contracts/src/model.ts` - Model types - `/packages/shared/src/model.ts` - Model utilities **Web App Entry:** - `/apps/web/src/main.tsx` - React entry point - `/apps/web/src/index.css` - Main stylesheet with CSS custom properties - `/apps/web/src/router.ts` - Router configuration - `/apps/web/src/store.ts` - Zustand store **Theme:** - `/apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` - Theme hook implementation **Configuration:** - `/apps/web/vite.config.ts` - Vite configuration - `/apps/web/tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration - `/apps/web/components.json` - shadcn/ui configuration - `/apps/web/index.html` - HTML entry point **Server:** - `/apps/server/src/index.ts` - Server entry point - `/apps/server/src/wsServer.ts` - WebSocket server --- ### 15. DESIGN TOKENS & CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES **Color Palette:** - **Primary:** oklch(0.488 0.217 264) light, oklch(0.588 0.217 264) dark [Purple] - **Success:** emerald-500/700 (light/dark) - **Warning:** amber-500/700 (light/dark) - **Destructive:** red-500/700 (light/dark) - **Info:** blue-500/700 (light/dark) - **Neutral:** Grayscale with neutral-50 through neutral-950 **Spacing & Border Radius:** - Base radius: 0.625rem (10px) - Radius variants: -sm, -md (default), -lg, -xl, -2xl, -3xl, -4xl **Typography:** - Primary font: DM Sans (variable) - Monospace: SF Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo --- This comprehensive structure establishes a modern, type-safe monorepo with a sophisticated theme system based on CSS custom properties, localStorage persistence, and system preference detection. The web application uses TailwindCSS v4 with CVA for components, TanStack Router for routing, and Zustand for state management, all coordinated through a centralized router setup with multiple providers.

Both `bun typecheck` and `bun lint` pass cleanly — the 2 lint warnings are pre-existing in server files unrelated to our changes (0 errors, 0 warnings in the new code).

Let me do a quick sanity-check on the final state of all modified files:

Everything is clean. Here's a summary of every change made:

---

## What was built

### `packages/contracts/src/theme.ts` *(new)*
Defines the shared type contract — `ThemeId`, `ThemeColors` (7 surface slots: background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, statusBar), and `BuiltInTheme`. Also exports `THEME_IDS` and `DEFAULT_THEME_ID` constants. No runtime logic — pure types and readonly data, consistent with the contracts package rules.

### `packages/contracts/src/index.ts` *(updated)*
Added `export * from "./theme"` so the types are reachable via `@t3tools/contracts`.

### `apps/web/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
Implements the three built-in themes using CSS-valid `oklch()` values:

| Theme | Character |
|---|---|
| **T3 Light** | Pure white editor, lavender sidebar, dark terminal strip |
| **T3 Dark** | Neutral-950-based dark, matching the previous default |
| **T3 Midnight** | Deep blue-purple dark with a brighter purple accent |

Also exports `getThemeById()` — throws on unknown IDs so callers stay type-safe with strict TypeScript.

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(replaced)*
Same module-level external-store pattern as before (CSS applied at module load, before React mounts, preventing any flash). Key differences:
- Returns `theme: ThemeId` instead of `"light" | "dark" | "system"`.
- `applyTheme` sets **7 CSS custom properties** on `<html>` (inline style, beats specificity of CSS rules): `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, `--ring`, `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar`.
- Toggles the `.dark` class so all existing Tailwind `dark:` utilities keep working.
- Migrates from the old `t3code:theme` key (`"light"` → `"t3-light"`, `"dark"` → `"t3-dark"`).

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx` *(new)*
React Context provider wrapping `useTheme()`. Memoises the context value so child trees only re-render when the theme actually changes. Exports `ThemeProvider` (added to the router `Wrap`) and `useThemeContext()` for components that prefer context over the standalone hook.

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Accessible `radiogroup` of three theme cards. Each card contains a **miniature UI preview** using the theme's actual color values: sidebar strip, status bar, editor area with simulated code lines (accent + foreground lines), and a terminal strip at the bottom. Selected state is shown with a `CheckIcon` badge anchored to the top-right corner.

### `apps/web/src/router.ts` *(updated)*
Added `ThemeProvider` as the innermost wrapper in the router `Wrap`, giving every route access to the context.

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` *(updated)*
Replaced the old light/dark/system radio group and its associated `THEME_OPTIONS` constant and `useTheme` import with a single `<ThemeSelector />` component in the Appearance section.

### `apps/web/src/index.css` *(updated)*
Added CSS fallback values for `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar` in both `:root` (light) and `@variant dark` blocks. These serve as safe defaults before the JS module fires and for any non-JS rendering context.
